tagged_types.name: Error_Handler_Type
tagged_types.code: type Error_Handler_Type is tagged null record;

documentation.description: The standard formatting handler: simply raise exceptions.

subprograms.name: Format_Not_Closed

documentation.description:
Handle the format reference in a message text string missing a
closing brace, e.g., "Arg {0".

subprograms.name: Illegal_Character

documentation.description:
Handle an illegal character in a format string, e.g., only digits
are expected after an opening brace, "Arg {x}"

subprograms.name: Missing_Argument

documentation.description: Handle a reference to a missing argument when formatting a message.
